release: GoalOS α‑AGI Ascension · Sovereign Reserve Ω · The Singularity Institution · Public Institutional Edition

documents.title: Founding Charter
documents.description: Defines purpose, authority hierarchy, admission gates, rights, rollback, and the bounded mandate of Sovereign Reserve Ω.

documents.title: Portfolio Constitution
documents.description: Governs asset classes, evidence levels, rights, safety, Mission 2 transfer, disposition, freshness, revocation, and concentration.

documents.title: Institutional Operating System
documents.description: Maps the operating rooms from opportunity signals and Nova-Seeds through proof, Chronicle, value realization, and capacity allocation.

documents.title: Governance Manual
documents.description: Defines decision rights, delegation, conflicts, reserved matters, escalation, and institutional records.

documents.title: Risk & Safety Framework
documents.description: Defines risk classes, prohibitions, canaries, monitoring, stop conditions, incident handling, and rollback.

documents.title: Proof & Validation Protocols
documents.description: Defines proof levels, Evidence Dockets, reviewer independence, replay, dissent, and claim-state discipline.

documents.title: Technology Architecture
documents.description: Describes system boundaries, evidence state, Chronicle, graph roots, security, integrations, conformance, and release gates.

documents.title: Data & Knowledge Governance
documents.description: Governs provenance, purpose limitation, access, retention, transformation, evidence linkage, and controlled knowledge reuse.

documents.title: Research & Innovation Charter
documents.description: Defines baseline discipline, falsification, high-novelty skepticism, reproducibility, and research-to-capability transitions.

documents.title: People & Culture Charter
documents.description: Defines accountable roles, protected dissent, competence, wellbeing, security culture, and human decision ownership.

documents.title: Communications & Transparency Framework
documents.description: Defines claim-status vocabulary, publication review, corrections, source lineage, confidentiality, and incident communications.

documents.title: Audit & Assurance Framework
documents.description: Defines internal audit, external assurance, technical conformance, rights review, findings, severity, remediation, and follow-up.

documents.title: Continuity & Resilience Plan
documents.description: Defines continuity, recovery priorities, minimal state reconstruction, communication, restoration tests, and reauthorization.

documents.title: Amendment & Evolution Process
documents.description: Defines proof-gated changes to charters, policies, models, agents, routing, schemas, and institutional controls.

documents.title: PROOF_LOOPS.md — Research Architecture
documents.description: Formalizes Objective → Proof Mission → AGI Jobs → Evidence → Chronicle → Validated Skill → Graph Root → Future Mission Improvement.

documents.title: AGI Alpha RSI — Sovereign Invention Governance
documents.description: Describes deterministic open-ended discovery, baseline-comparative evaluation, replay, stress, persistence, dossiers, and governed promotion.

documents.title: AGI.Eth Namespace + AGI Jobs
documents.description: Describes role-aware identity, scoped environments, proof-bearing work, validation, settlement, and bounded governance.

documents.title: ENS Routing as a Market Mechanism
documents.description: Describes commit-reveal routing, deterministic selection, receipts, challenges, and auditable allocation. Technical research only.

documents.title: Merkle Roots for the Validated Skill Graph
documents.description: Separates committed graph state from Chronicle authority and supports selective disclosure, continuity, revocation, and verification.

documents.title: GoalOS: Proof-Carrying Autonomy
documents.description: The canonical proof-to-capability operating system, including object model, evidence status, threat model, deployment path, and Proof Run 001.

documents.title: GoalOS: The Validated Skill Graph
documents.description: Defines proof-carrying capability memory with scope, provenance, validators, freshness, rollback, revocation, and bounded reuse.

documents.title: GoalOS Mission OS
documents.description: Explains the Governed Decision State, proof-to-action work, publication law, commercial wedge, conformance, and safety boundary.

documents.title: AEP-001: Proof-of-Evolution Constitution
documents.description: Defines proof-backed upgrade rights, public-private boundaries, evaluation, canaries, challenge windows, rollback, and evolution ledgers.
